changes.description: Canonical semantic_proposition spine schema with SPE extensions — 6 proposition classes, 4 semantic types as lineage fields
PATH A input bundle loader with readiness validation and input_hash computation
Six deterministic class derivers: structural dominance, coupling patterns, authority topology, tier grounding, hero moment grounding, cluster architecture
Multi-factor confidence scoring: tier base, evidence density, reconciliation alignment, structural strength, cross-validation
PROPOSED learning event emission for confidence gaps, coverage gaps, over-generalization, reconciliation friction
Proposition-specific review queue with 4 trigger types
Run directory output writer — spine, lineage, review queue, report, learning events
Optional AI-gated INFERRED tier — LLM-assisted cross-cutting pattern identification
Top-level SPE orchestrator — parallel to semantic_derivation_compiler.py
Added Phase 3c — Semantic Proposition Derivation between Phase 3b and Phase 4
Added SEMANTIC_PROPOSITION capability class and phase_03c consumption declaration
SPE architecture rationale — SDC/SPE coexistence, semantic sub-types as lineage fields, learning context at derivation-step level
